name: Shonosuke

traits.name: Coerce
traits.description: Once per activation this model may move a friendly model within S range up to 2".

traits.name: Man of the Shadows
traits.description: This model does not block line of sight.

kiFeats.name: Word on the Street
kiFeats.description: Look at your opponent's hand of cards. You may then swap one card from your hand with one from theirs.

kiFeats.name: Pull Strings
kiFeats.description: Move a friendly model up to its full move distance.

special: Leader of the Silvermoon Trade Syndicate's street operations. Shonosuke controls everything that happens in Jima's underworld.

name: Oda & Tautolu

traits.name: Paired
traits.description: Oda and Tautolu are always deployed and removed from the table together. They count as a single model for all purposes.

traits.name: Bodyguard
traits.description: While within S of the model they are guarding, this model may intercept attacks targeting that model.

kiFeats.name: Back to Back
kiFeats.description: Until the end of the round, this model gains +1 defence while adjacent to a friendly model.

special: A two-model unit — the muscle of the Syndicate. Oda handles threats up close while Tautolu provides cover.

name: Yokozuna Akashi

traits.name: Slam
traits.description: When this model charges, the target is moved 2" directly away from this model after the charge resolves.

traits.name: Immovable
traits.description: This model cannot be moved by enemy effects.

traits.name: Fear (1)
traits.description: Enemy models within M of this model must pass a Fear test or suffer -1 to all melee dice rolls.

kiFeats.name: Ring Out
kiFeats.description: Push target model up to 4" directly away. If they contact a piece of terrain or another model, they suffer 3 damage.

special: The champion sumo wrestler of Jima. An enormous model that dominates the table through pure physical presence.

name: Malosi

traits.name: Brutal
traits.description: This model adds +1 to all damage rolls in melee.

traits.name: Bludgeon
traits.description: On a successful melee attack, the target must pass a Strength test or become Prone.

kiFeats.name: Ground and Pound
kiFeats.description: Make an additional melee attack against a Prone enemy model.

special: A fearsome Polynesian-style warrior who excels at knocking enemies down and keeping them there.

name: Manu

traits.name: Acrobat
traits.description: This model ignores movement penalties for terrain.

traits.name: Thrown Weapon
traits.description: This model may make ranged attacks using its Strength.

kiFeats.name: Whirling Blades
kiFeats.description: Make a melee attack against every enemy model within S range.

special: Fast and aggressive, Manu uses speed and mobility to overwhelm opponents.

name: Rakki

traits.name: Lucky
traits.description: Once per game, this model may reroll any single dice roll.

traits.name: Fortune Favours
traits.description: Friendly models within S of this model gain +1 to Fate rolls.

kiFeats.name: Roll the Dice
kiFeats.description: A friendly model within M may reroll one dice from its next roll.

special: A lucky gambler who brings fortune to those around him. Low combat ability but excellent support.

name: Tsubaki

traits.name: Assassin
traits.description: This model ignores Armour when making attacks in the opponent's activation.

traits.name: Concealed
traits.description: This model may deploy hidden during scenario setup.

kiFeats.name: Deadly Caress
kiFeats.description: Target friendly model heals 2 wounds. Target enemy model suffers 2 wounds. Neither can be prevented.

special: A deadly kunoichi working for the Syndicate.

name: Saki

traits.name: Acrobat
traits.description: This model ignores movement penalties for terrain.

traits.name: Pickpocket
traits.description: When this model wins a melee exchange, it gains 1 Coin token.

special: A nimble street thief who uses agility over brute force.

name: Tomo

traits.name: Debt Collector
traits.description: When this model kills an enemy model, gain 2 Coin tokens.

special: The Syndicate's enforcer. No-nonsense muscle for collecting what is owed.

name: Pit Dogs

traits.name: Animal
traits.description: This model cannot make Ranged attacks and is immune to Fear, Terrifying and Coerce effects.

traits.name: Pack Tactics
traits.description: This model gains +1 attack die for each other friendly Animal model in base contact with the target.

special: Fighting dogs used as expendable attack units and objective holders.

name: Misao

traits.name: Spy
traits.description: At the start of the game, look at the top 3 cards of your opponent's deck.

traits.name: Informant
traits.description: Once per round, you may look at one card in your opponent's hand.

kiFeats.name: Stolen Intel
kiFeats.description: Your opponent must reveal all cards in their hand until the end of their next activation.

special: An information broker who manipulates the flow of battle through intelligence.

name: Old Zo

traits.name: Wise
traits.description: Friendly models within M of this model may use his Ki stat for Ki tests.

traits.name: Weathered
traits.description: This model is immune to all Condition effects on a roll of 4+.

kiFeats.name: Old Tricks
kiFeats.description: A friendly model within M immediately recovers from one Condition marker.

kiFeats.name: Years of Wisdom
kiFeats.description: A friendly model within M gains +2 Ki until the end of the round.

special: A veteran of the Syndicate's operations, Old Zo provides invaluable support through decades of experience.

traits.name: Street Fighter
traits.description: This model does not suffer penalties when fighting in difficult terrain.

name: Yoshiko

traits.name: Geisha
traits.description: Enemy models within S of this model suffer -1 to their Ki pool.

traits.name: Distraction
traits.description: Once per round this model may cause an enemy within S to lose 1 action.

kiFeats.name: Poison Tea
kiFeats.description: Target model gains the Poisoned condition.

special: Beautiful and deadly — Yoshiko uses charm and subtlety as weapons.

name: Zhiv

traits.name: Hired Sword
traits.description: This model may be taken as a Ronin hire by any faction.

traits.name: Mercenary
traits.description: At the start of the game, choose one faction trait. This model gains that trait for the game.

kiFeats.name: Pay Day
kiFeats.description: If this model kills an enemy this activation, gain 2 Coin tokens.

special: A foreign mercenary with a complicated past. One of the most versatile Syndicate models.

name: Minori

traits.name: Mastermind
traits.description: Once per round this model may give a friendly model within L range an additional action.

kiFeats.name: The Plan
kiFeats.description: A friendly model within L immediately performs a full activation out of turn.

special: A strategic genius who orchestrates Syndicate operations from the shadows.

name: Satzuko

traits.name: Healer
traits.description: Once per activation this model may remove 2 wounds from a friendly model in base contact.

kiFeats.name: Field Dressing
kiFeats.description: A friendly model within S recovers D3+1 wounds.

special: The Syndicate's medic. Keeps valuable assets fighting.

name: Kawai

traits.name: Child
traits.description: Enemy models that could target this model must pass a Will test to do so.

traits.name: Stealthy
traits.description: Ranged attacks targeting this model suffer -1 die.

kiFeats.name: Wide Eyes
kiFeats.description: Target enemy model within M loses 1 die on its next attack roll.

special: Don't let the innocent appearance fool you — Kawai is one of the Syndicate's most unpredictable assets.
